$comment: Opt-in example-harness catalog. Lists signature harness modules a clone can overlay on the common base. Each entry points to examples/harness/<name>/. Version policy: integer, bumped on breaking field changes. Forward-compat — readers reject unknown TOP-LEVEL keys (additionalProperties false) but tolerate unknown MODULE fields (additionalProperties true), so a v1 reader can load a v2 catalog's modules and skip fields it does not understand.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema file (./catalog.schema.json).

version.description: Catalog format version. Bump only on breaking field changes.

modules.description: Registered example-harness modules. Empty until modules are extracted and sanitized.

name.description: Module slug, also its directory name under examples/harness/.

suited_repo_type.description: Archetype this module best fits, e.g. flutter_se_product, ops_platform, content_pipeline.

summary.description: One-line English description. Must not contain family identifiers or non-English text.

harness_dir.description: Relative path to the module's harness snippet directory, e.g. flutter-app-pack/harness/.

provides.description: Skill / agent / config slugs the module overlays onto the common base.

source_families.description: Sanitized origin placeholders. In the public template these are always <example-family> — real family names are never published.

opt_in.description: Always true; modules are never applied automatically — a clone copies them in deliberately.
